[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)

- Description: Directed and reviewed the Handoff Auto-start feature (opt-in marker so Sophia can skip the initial go-for-it wait for specific plans) and the /chat session-lock ordering fix, discovered while scoping whether pinging an already-busy Sophia thread is safe. Authorized the design tradeoff (opt-in per-plan rather than removing the wait globally), directed the merge of all four units directly to main, and authorized the production deploy. Also identified the missing commit-URL-evidence gap in the AI-agent contribution tooling and directed the fix so future sessions aren't blocked the same way.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50
